judge_thought:
Explanation:
Reviewing the table, the athletes from the United States are Adam Shunk (rank 16) and Tora Harris (rank 10). None of the United States athletes appear in the qualified group (ranks 1–8 all have “q” and none are from the United States), meaning there is no other U.S. athlete who ranked above Adam Shunk within the qualifying subset.
